summary: Journey page UI refactor testing PASSED. All visual hierarchy changes verified: warm bone background (#faf8f5), Primary Hero Card with improved message preview, 'Why this matters' rename from 'AI Insight', rounded-[20px] sidebar cards, feed-style timeline bubbles, Radar Strip with warm colors. Pipeline and Login pages show no regression.
critical_code_review_comments: JourneyPage.js: CSS variable overrides correctly scoped to page wrapper div (lines 506-519)
PrimaryHeroCard.js: Message preview has improved spacing with rounded-xl and better text formatting (line 120)
CoachWatchCardV2.js: 'Why this matters' correctly renamed from 'AI Insight' (line 153-154)
ConversationBubble.js: Feed-style bubbles with rounded-2xl and warm colors (line 131-143)
RadarStrip.js: Warm text colors (#6b6358, #1a1a1a) matching bone palette
All sidebar cards use consistent rounded-[20px] and soft shadows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey page UI refactor complete. All visual changes verified: warm bone background, improved hero card, renamed AI insight section, consistent card styling. No regressions on Pipeline or Login pages.
